PORT.description: Port Open WebUI service listens inside container

WEBUI_SECRET_KEY.description: Signs session cookies JWTs. Auto-generated on deploy.

WEBUI_NAME.description: Name displayed in page title and email notifications

DEFAULT_MODELS.description: Comma-separated model IDs shown in chat selector (e.g. llama3.1:latest,gpt-4o). Leave empty for all available.

OPENAI_API_KEY.description: API key for OpenAI, OpenRouter, Groq or any OpenAI-compatible provider

OPENAI_API_BASE_URL.description: Base URL for OpenAI-compatible API (default: https://api.openai.com/v1)

ENABLE_SIGNUP.description: Allow new users to register on the signup page

ENABLE_LOGIN_FORM.description: Show email/password login form alongside OAuth

WEBUI_AUTH.description: Set false to disable auth entirely (not recommended for public apps)

SCARF_NO_ANALYTICS.description: Opt out of Scarf analytics page views (privacy)

ENABLE_ADMIN_EXPORT.description: Allow admins to export all chats data via admin settings

CORS_ALLOW_ORIGIN.description: Additional CORS origin to allow (comma-separated). Leave empty for auto-detect.

JWT_EXPIRES_IN.description: JWT session expiry in minutes. Leave empty for default value.

USE_CUDA_DOCKER.description: Enable NVIDIA CUDA support for local embeddings (requires GPU node)

RAG_TOP_K.description: Number of top documents retrieved per RAG query

WEBSITE_HOSTNAME.description: Public URL deployment. Set after first launch in Railway Variables tab.
